1
✦   one year   ✦

A Year of Us

May 2025 — April 2026
2
✦   the beginning   ✦
How We Met
Baku, Azerbaijan ✈
The Airport
You were calmly photographing the sunrise. I couldn't look away. I copied your exact angle — same shot, same spot — just to feel closer to you.
The Bus, Qabala
We sat on opposite sides. Not a single word — but we kept finding each other in the rear view mirror.
The Fence
You were climbing. I offered my hand. The world went quiet. After that, we couldn't stop talking.
The River · Ropeway · Rooftop
Four hours vanished. We went everywhere we weren't supposed to. Our parents had to call us back.
Shahdag
I gave you a flower. You put it in your hair. That night, I wrote you a poem.
The Exchange
You gave me your favourite scrunchy. I gave you my bracelet — 23 beads, just like your birthday.
The Miracle
Your family accidentally booked the 2 AM flight. You stayed five extra days. I drove back. Some things are simply meant.
— the poem I wrote for you —
"You make the flowers
I give you look pretty,
the way you wear them
like you were always
meant to be adorned."
a romcom that chose to be real ♥
3
✦   26 may 2024   ✦
When It Became Official
26 May 2024  ·  9:11 PM
You were at your aunty's apartment in Ahmedabad. I came with a paper rose I had folded — nothing grand, just everything I had.

I started talking. I couldn't stop. For 14 whole minutes, I yapped — about Baku, the sunrise, the fence, the bracelet, the scrunchy, about you. I never once said like. I always knew it was love, so that's exactly what I said.

At 8:57 PM, I told you I love you.
At 9:11 PM, I asked you to be my girlfriend.
And you said yes.

Then we went on morning walks. Then badminton. I kept picking flowers off the ground and giving them to you after every game.
8:57 PM "I love you." — said like I'd always known it, because I had.
9:11 PM 14 minutes of yapping later — "Will you be my girlfriend?" She said yes.
"He came with a paper rose
and 14 minutes of everything
he'd been holding since Baku."
4
✦   our story   ✦
Our Dates
✦
29 Sep · Rajkot · Navratri
Rain & the Shed
Actual garba, then rain. We ran under a shed but it still fell on us. We didn't move. We kissed in the rain, passionately, soaking and not caring even a little.
01
30 Sep · Rajkot · Gourmisserie
The Fake Garba Date
I told your mom it was indoor garba. It was a restaurant date — our first real one. Then we found a staircase with no CCTV.
∞
All Year · Every Screen
Online Dates
Hundreds of hours — every call a date.
🎬 Now You See Me 3 🏏 cricket matches 🌙 late night calls 🌅 morning facetimes
02
New Year's · Pune
The Secret Pune Trip
Didn't tell anyone at home. Two days as completely us — a life that felt like ours already.
top secret
5
✦   just ours   ✦
Cute Names We Call Each Other
♥   Rishi calls Neer…
Neeru Bubbu Bubbles Neenee Pyaaruu Babyyy Sweetums Cutuu Honeyy Wifey Hawtiee Mommy
♥   Neer calls Rishi…
Rishu Hubby Cutroo Hottiee Babygurll Gabbuu Daddy
"The names we make up
for each other are their own
tiny private language."
6
✦   for you   ✦
Songs That Remind Me of You
Dheere Dheere
Yo Yo Honey Singh
"teri-meri story jaise Big Bang Theory" — our story really did start like the universe deciding it had no choice.
Naina (From "Crew")
Diljit Dosanjh
"Maine liya tera naam hazaaran vaari" — I say your name in my head more than I'll ever admit.
Tere Naina
Shankar-Ehsaan-Loy
"Rab ki nemat hain teri nigaahein" — I first fell into you through your eyes at the airport. Still falling.
Maharani
Karun, Lambo Drive
"Mujhe nahi karna flex, par ye bandi hai aisi" — exactly this. No flex. Just facts.
Die For You
The Weeknd
"The distance and the time between us — it'll never change my mind." Long distance couldn't touch this.
Paper Rings
Taylor Swift
"I'd marry you with paper rings." I literally came with one. She said yes anyway.
No One Noticed
The Marías
"Fly to your city, excited to see your face" — the Pune trip. Secretly. Worth every second.
By My Side
AP Dhillon
"Bin tere okha ayy lagda samaa" — without you, time moves differently. Slower. Emptier.
Dekha Hazaro Dafaa
Arijit Singh
"Sambhaale sambhalta nahi yeh dil" — I've looked at you a thousand times and still can't hold myself together.
Thinking of You
AP Dhillon
"Tere bina e duniyaan adhuri meri" — incomplete. That's the only word for it without you.
Thodi Der
Farhan Saeed, Shreya Ghoshal
"Dil bharta nahin, aankhein rajti nahin" — no matter how much time we get, it's never enough.
7
✦   everything   ✦
Things I Love About You
I love everything about her. But if I had to put it into words —
🌊
The way she feels. There is no better word for it. Being near her is like exhaling after holding your breath for too long.
🤍
The way she cares for others. She carries people. Not just me — everyone. She gives pieces of herself freely and still has so much left.
✨
The way she makes me feel everything so highly. With her, nothing is halfway. Joy is bigger. Peace is deeper. Love is louder.
🌸
The way she cutely scolds me. She looks so serious and so adorable at exactly the same time. I never want to stop being on the receiving end of it.
🔥
The way she publicly tempts me. She knows exactly what she's doing. Every single time. And she does it anyway.
💛
The way she cares for me. My feelings. My moods. My silences. She pays attention in a way that makes me feel completely seen.
😊
The way she smiles. It starts in her eyes before her mouth catches up. I would do embarrassing things just to see it.
👑
The way she looks like a goddess and a queen. She doesn't try. She just is. And she has no idea.
💫
The charming essence of her soul. Something about her — I can't fully name it. It's the reason I couldn't look away at the airport and the reason I still can't now.
her smile ♥
our world ♥

"Most of all —
the charming essence
of her soul."

8
✦   saved forever   ✦
My Favourite Messages ♥
9
✦   sworn   ✦
To Neeru,
I Promise
I
To keep building our story. Page by page, never taking our small moments for granted, always treating our history as something worth celebrating.
II
To be your steady ground. In a world that is constantly shifting and demanding, I promise to be the space where you can entirely lower your guard and just be.
III
To listen to the unsaid. To pay attention to the quiet moments, the subtle shifts, the things you carry — so you never have to carry them entirely alone.
IV
To choose you, consistently and intentionally. Not just on milestones or anniversaries, but on the quiet ordinary days where love is a choice we make together.
V
To match your warmth with my loyalty. To protect the space we've built together, and to keep looking at you with the exact same awe I do today.
VI
Through every changing season. Every new page, every milestone ahead — I'm all in.
Neer & Rishi ♥
always ♥
"Through every changing season,
every new page ahead —
I'm all in."
— Rishi, 26 May 2025
10
✦   my favourite thing   ✦
You're So Silly ♥
She is simultaneously the funniest and most unaware of it. Here is my evidence:
She makes me laugh anywhere
In public, mid-sentence, at the worst timing. She'll say something completely unhinged and look at me like I'm the weird one for reacting.
She turns me on in public 😭
Fully intentional. She knows. She does it anyway. Then acts innocent. Every. Single. Time.
She teases me about my height
She is shorter than me and still manages to make me feel like the small one. I have no explanation for this.
She adores me like a baby
She treats me like I'm simultaneously the most powerful person in the room AND a small feral creature she found and decided to keep. Both are accurate.
She got upset when I didn't take care of her
The way she looked at me. So done. So dramatic. So completely right. I never made that mistake again.
The mirchi dream 😂
I fed her mirchi in MY dream even though she doesn't like it. She was upset. In my dream. I woke up confused about whose fault that was.
She vibes to songs bobbling her head
The little head-bobble when a good song comes on. She goes fully into it. Eyes closed. Completely in her world. My favourite sight.
"She's a whole chaos wrapped in the softest packaging. I'm obsessed."

✦   always   ✦
You Make My Heart…
01
You make my heart ache with how desperately, deeply, and completely I love you.
02
You make my heart race, consuming every single thought until all I want is you.
03
You make my heart burn with a passion that belongs entirely, solely to you.
04
You make my heart overflow with a fierce, breathless kind of love.
05
You make my heart beat with a fierce, reckless kind of certainty that it's always been you.
06
You make my heart burn so deeply that every moment without you feels like waiting.
07
You make my heart ache with a breathless, all-consuming need to just hold you close.
08
You make my heart spill over with an electric, unstoppable love that completely takes over.
09
You make my heart hammer against my chest, reminding me how fiercely alive I am with you.
"With you, every heartbeat feels like it was always meant for this."
— for Neeru, always ♥
14
✦   a–z   ✦
A–Z of You, Neeru
26 letters, all for you
AAll-consuming love that took over my entire world.
BBreathless moments whenever I look at you.
CChaotic joy that only you can bring into my life.
DDeep certainty that it will always be you.
EElectric touch that makes my heart race instantly.
FFierce loyalty to everything we are building together.
GGorgeous laugh that completely disarms me.
HHome, because that is exactly what you feel like.
IIrresistible charm that keeps me falling every single day.
JJealous guard over every precious memory we make.
KKindred soul, the missing piece to my puzzle.
LLimitless passion that grows stronger with time.
MMagnetic pull that always draws me back to you.
NNever-ending devotion through every single season.
OOverflowing happiness whenever you are near.
PPure magic hidden in our ordinary, quiet days.
QQuiet comfort of just holding you close.
RReckless certainty that I am all in, forever.
SSoulmate, in every definition of the word.
TTender moments that balance our wild energy.
UUnwavering promise to choose you, day after day.
VVulnerability that we only share with each other.
WWarmth that melts away any stress or distance.
XXoXo, for every unsaid 'I love you' in between.
Y"Yippie" happiness that brightens my darkest days.
ZZeal, the burning fire and energy of our love.

17
✦   year one   ✦
Run It Back
If I could relive every moment of this year with you, I would. Every single one. Here are the ones I'd run back first:
01
The airport. The sunrise. The moment I first saw you.
02
The fence in Qabala. Offering my hand. The world going quiet.
03
The rooftop. Four hours. Our parents calling us back.
04
The flower in your hair. Writing the poem that night.
05
26 May, 9:11 PM. You said yes.
06
Rain under the shed at Navratri. Kissing in the rain.
07
Gourmisserie. The fake garba. The staircase.
08
New Year's in Pune. Two days like it was already our life.
09
Every single late night call where time stopped entirely.
10
Right now. This year. All of it.
run it back. i'd do it all again. ♥

18
✦   365 days   ✦
365 Days
One whole year of you. Click the envelope to open it.
♥
My dearest Neeru,

I am still writing this. Because no words I draft feel like enough.

But here is what I know: this year — every single day of it — has been the most alive I have ever felt. Because of you. Because of us.

You came into my life like something I didn't know I'd been waiting for. And every morning since, I have woken up grateful — quietly, deeply, completely grateful — that you are mine and I am yours.

Thank you for being everything. For the laughs, the fights, the facetimes, the distance, the closeness. For making ordinary moments feel like the ones worth keeping.

Here's to 365 more. And then every year after that.

— your Rishu ♥
26 · May · 2025
click the envelope to open ↑
19
✦   the specific things   ✦
The Things About You
Not the big things. The quiet, specific, irreplaceable ones.
Your eyes through the screen
Every facetime, the first thing I look for. Even blurry, even half-asleep — your eyes are the most honest thing I know.
The way you look at the camera
Like you're actually looking at me. Not at a lens. At me. I feel it every time.
Your laugh through a phone speaker
Tinny and compressed and still the best sound. I would call just to hear it with no reason at all.
When you get sleepy on call
You fight it so hard. Your eyes close. You jolt awake. You say "I'm not sleeping" and you are fully asleep. I never hang up first.
The way distance never really worked on us
We were always in different cities. And somehow we built something that feels closer than anything I've ever known.
"Thousands of kilometres apart and somehow always exactly with you."
20
✦   everything   ✦
Our World
We built a whole world this year. Not a grand one — a real one. Made of late night calls that stretched until 4 AM, filters and aliens and making each other laugh for no reason, matched fits and morning walks and badminton flowers and the way we always, always find each other.
the small things that are actually everything
🌙 late night calls 🛸 alien filters 🏸 badminton flowers ☕ morning facetimes 🎵 head-bobble vibing 📸 matched fits 🌧️ rain kisses 🌅 the airport sunrise 💤 falling asleep on call 🌸 flowers everywhere 📿 23 beads 🎬 movie nights 💌 scheduled messages 🌡️ "my temperature rn" 💛 a paper rose 🫶 the fence, Qabala
"In a world full of everything,
we built our own small one
and it is my favourite place."
us ♥
always ♥
our whole world ♥
Neer ♥
year one ♥
21
✦   from him, to her   ✦
A Letter to Neer
My Neeru,

I have been trying to write this for a while. And I keep stopping because nothing sounds like enough. So I am just going to say it simply.

You are the most remarkable person I have ever known. Not because you are perfect — but because you are exactly yourself, always. And that self is something I would choose every single time.

This year you made me feel things I didn't know I was capable of feeling. You made me laugh until I couldn't breathe. You made me miss you so badly that cities felt like cruelty. You made me want to be better — not for you, but because of you.

I love that you headbobble to songs. I love that you scold me cutely and mean it. I love that you said yes. I love that you wrote your R on your veins and sent it to me. I love that you stayed in Ahmedabad by accident and it was the least accidental thing that ever happened to me.

Here is what I need you to know: I am not afraid of the years ahead. Not with you. Not even a little.

— your Rishu, always ♥
26 · May · 2025
Neeru ♥
us, year one ♥
♥ ♥ ♥
